news.headline: UK's economy showing signs of recovery after period of stagnation, UK's GDP grew by 2.3% in the last quarter.
Bitwise predicts XRP could reach $29.30 by 2030 due to real-world utility like asset tokenization and cross-border payments.
news.summary: Bitwise Asset Management recently provided an analysis of XRP's utility, indicating that the cryptocurrency's value may increasingly come from practical applications rather than speculative trading. The report highlighted that XRP's blockchain, the XRP Ledger, is currently utilized for direct payments and cross-currency transactions, making up the majority of the network's activity. Bitwise emphasized that the blockchain's future growth may be dependent on its role in converting real-world assets into tradable blockchain tokens and facilitating streamlined transactions for global financial institutions. The report suggested that asset tokenization could be a significant opportunity for the XRP Ledger.

Global flavored milk market expected to reach US$102.86B by 2033 with a CAGR of 7.18% from 2025. Factors for growth include health consciousness & creative packaging.
news.summary: The report "Flavored Milk Market Size and Share Analysis - Growth Trends and Forecast Report 2025-2033" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. According to the report, the Flavored Milk market is projected to increase from US$ 55.11 billion in 2024 to US$ 102.86 billion by 2033, indicating a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7.18% during the period from 2025 to 2033. Several factors fueling this growth include the growing trend of health awareness, innovative packaging solutions, and collaborations between dairy manufacturers and other industries.

news.headline: Xsolla launches JOIN program in LATAM to support indie game developers with mentorship and tools for business growth.
news.summary: Xsolla, a renowned global video game commerce company, has launched the Journey of Indies (JOIN) Program in Brazil to empower indie and mid-tier game developers in Latin America. The initiative focuses on aiding developers in scaling their businesses by providing access to commercialization tools, mentorship, and industry partnerships. Through integration into Xsolla's ecosystem, the program seeks to foster innovation, create more opportunities, and drive growth for developers in the region.

Awilco Drilling PLC declares an interim dividend of USD 2.06 per share, payable in Q2 2025. Ex-dividend on 1 April 205, record date 2 April, payment around 11 April 2025.
news.summary: Awilco Drilling PLC has declared an interim dividend of USD 2.06 per share for Q2 2025. The ex-dividend date is set for April 1, 2025, with a record date of April 2, 2025. Shareholders can anticipate the dividend payment to be made on or about April 11, 2025.

news.headline: Details for government bond auctions by Riksbank have been disclosed with specific terms and conditions.
Saks Global to operate Neiman Marcus Downtown Dallas store till 2025 holiday season, exploring reimagination with City of Dallas.
news.summary: In Dallas, Saks Global has revealed plans to keep running the Neiman Marcus Downtown Dallas store until the 2025 Holiday season. The company aims to revamp the location in partnership with the City of Dallas. Discussions have taken place between city authorities and Saks Global executives to consider fresh ideas for the space that will benefit customers and the local community. Ideas for the redesigned area may entail a luxurious format to aid the revival of Downtown Dallas.

news.headline: Global Challenger Innovation Contest 2025 launched in Hong Kong by 10x1000 Tech for Inclusion and xcube.co, empowering visionaries with tech-driven solutions.
news.summary: In Hong Kong, the Global Challenger Innovation Contest 2025 was introduced at the JUMPSTARTER 2025 event by the 10x1000 Tech for Inclusion community and xcube.co. This contest, now in its second year, builds on the achievements of the 2024 competition and aims to inspire creators to develop technology-based initiatives that foster inclusivity and social change. The Global Challenger Innovation Contest was initially launched in 2024, and it seeks to empower innovators to address global challenges through tech solutions.

news.headline: Exelon (Nasdaq: EXC) will announce first quarter 2025 results on May 1 at 9:00 a.m CT. CEO and CFO will lead the call.
news.summary: Exelon (Nasdaq: EXC) will be conducting its Q1 2025 earnings conference call on May 1 at 9:00 a.m. CT/10:00 a.m. ET. Leading the call will be CEO Calvin Butler and CFO Jeanne Jones. To tune in to the presentation, use the live listen-only webcast link available on the Investor Relations page. The audio webcast will also be archived.

news.headline: Blockchain's business potential hinges on privacy. Protect sensitive data with selective disclosure and dual-asset systems. Govts mandate privacy.
news.summary: Eran Barak, CEO of Midnight, discusses the challenges faced by blockchain technology in realizing its full business potential. The issue lies in the exposure of sensitive data on public blockchains, leading to privacy breaches and compliance violations. While privacy on the blockchain is a complex issue, it is vital for the adoption of Web3 technology by businesses. Barak highlights the misconception that governments oppose privacy on the blockchain when in reality, they mandate privacy across industries. He suggests a dual-asset system using public and private tokens to protect metadata while ensuring regulatory compliance and innovation. The article emphasizes the importance of maintaining privacy on the blockchain for businesses to advance in the digital economy.

news.headline: The Sandbox launches Alpha Season 5 on March 31 with iconic brands like Jurassic World, Teletubbies, Atari, and more.
news.summary: Los Angeles-based gaming and social platform, The Sandbox, a subsidiary of Animoca Brands, is set to launch Alpha Season 5 on March 31. The upcoming season will run for six weeks and introduce new games, social activities, and immersive worlds for exploration. The highlight of Alpha Season 5 is a collaboration with Jurassic World in partnership with Universal Products & Experiences and Amblin Entertainment. This season aims to offer engaging experiences to users featuring curated community-generated content.

news.summary: Season 5 of Alpha brings in more than $1 million in SAND token rewards to The Sandbox, as the platform introduces over 40 new game experiences.

news.headline: Bitcoin's price fluctuates, while altcoins plummet amid rising inflation in February.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.5%, the lowest it has been in five years. This decrease in unemployment is attributed to the creation of 200,000 new jobs in the last quarter. Additionally, the report stated that the average hourly wage has increased by 3.2% compared to last year. The construction industry saw the most significant job growth, followed by the healthcare and technology sectors. Economists are optimistic about the country's economic outlook as these positive trends continue.

news.headline: PANTHERx® Rare chosen by Soleno Therapeutics to distribute VYKAT™ XR, a rare disease product in US.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on March 28, 2025, PANTHERx® Rare, a prominent provider of services for rare disease patients in the US, was chosen by Soleno Therapeutics to serve as the specialty pharmacy for the dispersal of VYKAT™ XR (diazoxide).
